changes.newValue:
1. Develop backend/scripts/test_e2e_ai_workflow.py: Create a comprehensive script that starts the listener, triggers the ANALYZING state, and monitors the full lifecycle.
2. Mock AI Server: Intercept httpx calls to return deterministic LabelMe JSON payloads during the test.
3. Verify Data Payload: Assert chromosome document structure and counts in Firestore after processing.
4. Verify Audit: Ensure status transitions and audit logs are correctly generated.

changes.newValue: Successfully implemented and verified End-to-End AI analysis workflow. Fixed event loop handling in FirestoreListener to support multithreaded snapshots. Flattened polygon coordinate arrays in DataMapper to comply with Firestore nested array restrictions. Developed test_e2e_ai_workflow.py with AI server mocking and validated: status transitions (UPLOADED -> PROCESSING -> COMPLETED), chromosome document creation, and audit logging.
